mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_groups(group_key, group_name, use_yn, tenant_id) VALUES(#{groupKey}, #{groupName}, #{useYn}, #{tenantId})
INSERT INTO codes(group_key, code, name, value, sort_order, use_yn, tenant_id) VALUES(#{groupKey}, #{code}, #{name}, #{value}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{tenantId})
